stages.label: Seed leaderboard target rows
stages.detail: 3/3 leaderboard target env keys collected; waiting for write prerequisites.

stages.label: Verify leaderboard backend scopes
stages.detail: Read kickoff_leaderboard through anon REST and require the current user in global, friend and season filtered queries; global_rank, friend_rank and season_rank must be positive scoped ranks.

stages.label: Verify production leaderboard evidence
stages.detail: Run the strict production evidence checks that gate the leaderboard backend category; global_rank, friend_rank and season_rank must be positive scoped ranks.

friend target and board queries are complete

nextAction: Seed leaderboard target rows: set VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY first.
copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent leaderboard production bootstrap
Mode: plan
Stages: 0/3 ready or done
Missing env: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
Next action: Seed leaderboard target rows: set VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY first.
Target queries:
- global: kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&limit=1
- friend: kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&friend_code=eq.chengdu&limit=1
- season: kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=xp.desc&id=eq.kickoff-production-seed&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=1
Board queries:
- global: kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=global_rank.asc&limit=20
- friend: kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=friend_rank.asc&friend_code=eq.chengdu&limit=20
- season: kickoff_leaderboard?select=id,display_name,location,friend_code,season_key,locks,revealed,average_score,best_score,xp,streak,exact_hits,verified_proofs,mode_proofs,global_rank,friend_rank,season_rank,rank,updated_at&order=season_rank.asc&season_key=eq.world-cup-run&limit=20
Query contracts:
- global: passed · target=ok · board=ok
- friend: passed · target=ok · board=ok
- season: passed · target=ok · board=ok
Rank requirement: global_rank, friend_rank and season_rank must be positive scoped ranks.
Commands:
- bun run seed:production-targets --dry-run
- bun run doctor:supabase
- bun run verify:production
Stages:
- Seed leaderboard target rows [blocked]
  command: bun run seed:production-targets --dry-run
  execute: bun run seed:production-targets --upload-share-image --upload-mode-share-image
  requires: VITE_PUBLIC_APP_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, KICKOFF_SEED_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_SHARE_IMAGE_URL, KICKOFF_SEED_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL or KICKOFF_VERIFY_MODE_SHARE_IMAGE_URL
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
  outputs: KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY
  detail: 3/3 leaderboard target env keys collected; waiting for write prerequisites.
- Verify leaderboard backend scopes [blocked]
  command: bun run doctor:supabase
  execute: bun run doctor:supabase
  requires: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
  outputs: global leaderboard current user, friend leaderboard current user, season leaderboard current user
  detail: Read kickoff_leaderboard through anon REST and require the current user in global, friend and season filtered queries; global_rank, friend_rank and season_rank must be positive scoped ranks.
- Verify production leaderboard evidence [blocked]
  command: bun run verify:production
  execute: bun run verify:production
  requires: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, KICKOFF_VERIFY_USER_ID, KICKOFF_VERIFY_FRIEND_CODE, KICKOFF_VERIFY_SEASON_KEY
  missing: VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
  outputs: leaderboard-global-current-user, leaderboard-friend-current-user, leaderboard-season-current-user
  detail: Run the strict production evidence checks that gate the leaderboard backend category; global_rank, friend_rank and season_rank must be positive scoped ranks.
